radiality.label: OBSERVED
radiality.method: hub-and-spoke proxy from center dominance and leaf fraction

linearity.label: OBSERVED
linearity.method: path-likeness proxy from endpoint structure and acyclicity

triadic_closure.label: OBSERVED
triadic_closure.method: mean of transitivity, clustering, and triangle density

chirality.label: DERIVED
chirality.method: signed-area imbalance on directed temporal motifs

episodes.hypothesis: The direct v1 loop persists turn state, applies edit feedback, and emits the full export family.
episodes.manipulation: Bootstrap blank graph, run one chat turn, apply edit feedback, then export the experiment.
episodes.observable: Turn count increments, membrane strips scaffold headings, feedback enters retrieval, observatory exports materialize.
episodes.outcome: Observed in the current test pass: `tests/test_runtime_e2e.py::test_single_graph_bootstrap_chat_feedback_and_exports`.

episodes.hypothesis: Preview/commit/revert persists attributable measurement events and graph rollback.
episodes.manipulation: Seed a session, preview an edge-add action, commit it, then revert the committed event.
episodes.observable: Measurement ledger delta, committed edge present after commit and absent after revert.
episodes.outcome: Observed in the current test pass: `tests/test_observatory_measurements.py::test_edge_measurement_commit_and_revert_persist`.

episodes.hypothesis: Hum refresh remains a bounded continuity artifact and stays out of prompt injection.
episodes.manipulation: Run a chat turn, apply edit feedback, then inspect hum payload and next-turn preview prompt.
episodes.observable: Hum feedback counts rise; `current_hum.md` and `current_hum.json` are absent from prompt assembly.
episodes.outcome: Observed in the current test pass: `tests/test_hum_runtime.py::test_feedback_refreshes_hum_without_prompt_injection`.
